narrative: As a Recommendation Systems Engineer with 6 years of experience at Amazon, this candidate offers a strong product company background and ideal Pune location. They rank #19 primarily due to a solid experience level alignment and verified skill depth in areas like LoRA, QLoRA, OpenSearch, and Learning to Rank, which are highly relevant to our Senior AI/ML Engineer role focused on Search & Retrieval. However, their overall JD-relevant skill match was below the pool average, and minor concerns regarding profile credibility were flagged.
